title: Yoga Instructor Course (YIC)
content: Yoga Instructor Course (YIC) Department of Allied and Health Sciences Programme Level Under Graduate Duration 1 Month About the Programme Eligibility Fee Structure About the Programme Eligibility 12th with minimum 50% marks Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit.
